title: Future Builders Center for Training and Community Development Project
description: A center that provides various training courses and social activities for the local community.
fullDescription: The Future Builders Center was launched in early 2024 in the city of Atarib in the western countryside of Aleppo as a community initiative aimed at providing non-formal education and community rehabilitation services for war-affected groups, especially school students and orphans. The center provides a safe and stimulating environment for learning and interaction through diverse educational, technical, and psychological training programs implemented throughout the year in collaboration with specialized trainers.
importanceList: The project helped bridge educational and technological gaps among the target groups.
It served as a community development platform that strengthened local cohesion.
The project created new opportunities for learning and personal growth.
objectives: Enhancing alternative education opportunities and academic support for orphans and vulnerable groups.
Developing technological and social skills for adolescents and youth.
Empowering educational staff through capacity-building training programs.
Providing psychological and educational support for orphans in a safe and nurturing environment.
Promoting awareness and culture through public events and smart activities.

components.title: Academic Education and Support:
components.description: Supporting school students, especially orphans, through remedial programs and individualized learning plans.

components.title: Technical and Digital Training:
components.description: Regular courses in computer skills and programming based on different levels.

components.title: Educational Development:
components.description: Organizing training programs to improve the capacity of teachers and administrative staff.

components.title: Psychological Support:
components.description: Psychological support sessions, recreational activities, and interactive intelligence games.

components.title: Cultural and Intellectual Activities:
components.description: Seminars and open discussions on educational and intellectual topics.

courses.title: Language Courses
courses.description: Courses in English, Turkish, and Arabic for beginners and advanced learners
courses.details: These courses aim to develop participants’ language skills including reading, writing, speaking, and listening through interactive methods and practical applications.
courses.sessions: Twice a week (2 hours per session)
goals: Develop communication skills in foreign languages
courses.outcomes: More than 70% of participants were able to communicate at a basic level in the target language after completing the course.

courses.title: Computer Skills
courses.description: Courses in basic computer skills, office software, graphic design, and web development
courses.details: These courses cover a wide range of technical skills from basic computer usage to advanced design and programming, including hands-on training on modern tools and technologies.
courses.sessions: 3 times per week (2 hours per session)
goals: Prepare youth for the digital job market
courses.outcomes: 65% of graduates secured jobs or started their own projects.

courses.title: Arts and Music
courses.description: Courses in drawing, Arabic calligraphy, music, and theater for children and youth
courses.details: These courses aim to discover and develop artistic talents and provide a space for creative expression, ending with exhibitions, plays, and concerts.
courses.sessions: Twice a week (2 hours per session)
courses.outcomes: 12 art exhibitions, 8 theater performances, and 6 concerts were organized.

communityEvents.title: Beekeepers Association
communityEvents.description: Association meetings to showcase modern tools.
communityEvents.details: Sessions aimed at enhancing technical and community knowledge through interactive participation.
communityEvents.outcomes: 70% of participants showed noticeable improvement in understanding modern technologies.

communityEvents.title: Cultural Lectures
communityEvents.description: Knowledge-based events to enhance awareness and culture.
communityEvents.details: Sessions led by specialists to promote critical thinking and community dialogue.
communityEvents.outcomes: Events contributed to increased awareness and community engagement.
